meta.title: Eric Strohmaier - Custom Software for Small Businesses
meta.description: I build custom software, internal tools, automations, and high-converting websites for small and mid-sized businesses - software that pays for itself.

hero.title: Software that makes your business more money.
hero.subtitle: I build custom tools, automations, and websites for small and mid-sized businesses - software designed to cut costs, save hours, and bring in revenue. The kind that pays for itself.

paragraphs: I'm Eric - a self-taught engineer who learned to build by shipping, and solving real problems.
Most of my work is boring and profitable for my clients: automating the repetitive tasks, building custom tools that replace fragile spreadsheets, and fixing websites so they actually earn.

For one client I grew revenue 270% by rebuilding their SEO and bringing in the right traffic. I build my own products too - PromptSloth reached 7,000+ users and $3K in revenue in just 9 months on organic search alone, with no active marketing, and now runs on autopilot.

whatIBuild.title: Three ways software pays you back.

items.title: Revenue websites & lead systems
items.blurb: Get found, win trust, and turn visitors into booked calls and paying customers.

items.title: Internal tools & automations
items.blurb: Replace manual busywork and fragile spreadsheets with software that runs itself.

items.title: Ongoing software partnership
items.blurb: A senior developer on call to keep things running and ship improvements every month.

howItWorks.title: Simple to start. Built to last.

steps.title: Call
steps.copy: We talk through your business and find where software can make or save you the most money.

steps.title: Build
steps.copy: I scope it, build it, and ship it fast - software that does the job, with nothing you don't need.

steps.title: Maintain & grow
steps.copy: I keep it running and keep improving it, so it pays off month after month.

midCta.title: Not sure what to build first?
midCta.copy: That's what the call is for. We'll find the highest-payback fix together.

featuredWork.title: Built to be used - and to last.

testimonials.label: What clients say
testimonials.title: Don't just take my word for it.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.footnote: No contracts. No lock-in. You stay because it pays for itself.

tiers.name: Website Care Plan

bullets: Conversion-focused website that turns visitors into leads
Uptime monitoring so you're never down quietly
Small content & design changes every month
Fast load times that keep customers from bouncing
One point of contact - no agencies, no runaround

tiers.name: Software Partner
tiers.who: For businesses that want to keep improving - a senior dev on call, month to month.
bullets: A senior developer on call for your business
Priority turnaround on what matters most
Continuous work toward more revenue, less busywork

tiers.name: Custom Software
tiers.who: For specific problems worth solving - internal tools, automations, and revenue features.
bullets: Built to make or save you money, measured
Automations that kill repetitive manual work
AI tools tailored to how you actually operate

finalCta.title: Let's find the software that pays for itself.
finalCta.copy: Book a free call. We'll look at where you're leaking time or money and what it would take to fix it. No pressure, no jargon.
